summaries.GET /me/following/contains: Check If User Follows Artists or Users

descriptions.DELETE /me/albums: Remove one or more albums from the current user's 'Your Music' library.
descriptions.DELETE /me/audiobooks: Remove one or more audiobooks from the Spotify user's library.
descriptions.DELETE /me/episodes:
Remove one or more episodes from the current user's library.
This API endpoint is in __beta__ and could change without warning.
descriptions.DELETE /me/following: Remove the current user as a follower of one or more artists or other Spotify users.
descriptions.DELETE /me/shows: Delete one or more shows from current Spotify user's library.
descriptions.DELETE /me/tracks: Remove one or more tracks from the current user's 'Your Music' library.
descriptions.DELETE /playlists/{playlist_id}/follower: Remove the current user as a follower of a playlist.
descriptions.DELETE /playlists/{playlist_id}/tracks: Remove one or more items from a user's playlist.
descriptions.GET /albums: Get Spotify catalog information for multiple albums identified by their Spotify IDs.
descriptions.GET /albums/{id}: Get Spotify catalog information for a single album.
descriptions.GET /albums/{id}/tracks: Get Spotify catalog information about an album’s tracks.
descriptions.GET /artists: Get Spotify catalog information for several artists based on their Spotify IDs.
descriptions.GET /artists/{id}: Get Spotify catalog information for a single artist identified by their unique Spotify ID.
descriptions.GET /artists/{id}/albums: Get Spotify catalog information about an artist's albums.
descriptions.GET /artists/{id}/related-artists: Get Spotify catalog information about artists similar to a given artist.
descriptions.GET /artists/{id}/top-tracks: Get Spotify catalog information about an artist's top tracks by country.
descriptions.GET /audio-analysis/{id}: Get a low-level audio analysis for a track in the Spotify catalog.
descriptions.GET /audio-features: Get audio features for multiple tracks based on their Spotify IDs.
descriptions.GET /audio-features/{id}:
Get audio feature information for a single track identified by its unique
Spotify ID.
descriptions.GET /audiobooks:
Get Spotify catalog information for several audiobooks identified by their Spotify IDs.
**Note: Audiobooks are only available for the US, UK, Ireland, New Zealand and Australia markets.**
descriptions.GET /audiobooks/{id}:
Get Spotify catalog information for a single audiobook.
**Note: Audiobooks are only available for the US, UK, Ireland, New Zealand and Australia markets.**
descriptions.GET /audiobooks/{id}/chapters:
Get Spotify catalog information about an audiobook's chapters.
**Note: Audiobooks are only available for the US, UK, Ireland, New Zealand and Australia markets.**
descriptions.GET /browse/categories: Get a list of categories used to tag items in Spotify (on, for example, the Spotify player’s “Browse” tab).
descriptions.GET /browse/categories/{category_id}: Get a single category used to tag items in Spotify (on, for example, the Spotify player’s “Browse” tab).
descriptions.GET /browse/categories/{category_id}/pla: Get a list of Spotify playlists tagged with a particular category.
descriptions.GET /browse/featured-playlists: Get a list of Spotify featured playlists (shown, for example, on a Spotify player's 'Browse' tab).
descriptions.GET /browse/new-releases: Get a list of new album releases featured in Spotify (shown, for example, on a Spotify player’s “Browse” tab).
descriptions.GET /chapters:
Get Spotify catalog information for several chapters identified by their Spotify IDs.
**Note: Chapters are only available for the US, UK, Ireland, New Zealand and Australia markets.**
descriptions.GET /chapters/{id}:
Get Spotify catalog information for a single chapter.
**Note: Chapters are only available for the US, UK, Ireland, New Zealand and Australia markets.**
descriptions.GET /episodes: Get Spotify catalog information for several episodes based on their Spotify IDs.
descriptions.GET /episodes/{id}:
Get Spotify catalog information for a single episode identified by its
unique Spotify ID.
descriptions.GET /markets: Get the list of markets where Spotify is available.
descriptions.GET /me:
Get detailed profile information about the current user (including the
current user's username).
descriptions.GET /me/albums: Get a list of the albums saved in the current Spotify user's 'Your Music' library.
descriptions.GET /me/albums/contains: Check if one or more albums is already saved in the current Spotify user's 'Your Music' library.
descriptions.GET /me/audiobooks: Get a list of the audiobooks saved in the current Spotify user's 'Your Music' library.
descriptions.GET /me/audiobooks/contains: Check if one or more audiobooks are already saved in the current Spotify user's library.
descriptions.GET /me/episodes:
Get a list of the episodes saved in the current Spotify user's library.
This API endpoint is in __beta__ and could change without warning.
descriptions.GET /me/episodes/contains:
Check if one or more episodes is already saved in the current Spotify user's 'Your Episodes' library.
This API endpoint is in __beta__ and could change without warning.
descriptions.GET /me/following: Get the current user's followed artists.
descriptions.GET /me/following/contains: Check to see if the current user is following one or more artists or other Spotify users.
descriptions.GET /me/player: Get information about the user’s current playback state, including track or episode, progress, and active device.
descriptions.GET /me/player/currently-playing: Get the object currently being played on the user's Spotify account.
descriptions.GET /me/player/devices: Get information about a user’s available devices.
descriptions.GET /me/player/queue: Get the list of objects that make up the user's queue.
descriptions.GET /me/player/recently-played: Get tracks from the current user's recently played tracks.
descriptions.GET /me/playlists:
Get a list of the playlists owned or followed by the current Spotify
user.
descriptions.GET /me/shows: Get a list of shows saved in the current Spotify user's library.
descriptions.GET /me/shows/contains: Check if one or more shows is already saved in the current Spotify user's library.
descriptions.GET /me/top/artists: Get the current user's top artists based on calculated affinity.
descriptions.GET /me/top/tracks: Get the current user's top tracks based on calculated affinity.
descriptions.GET /me/tracks: Get a list of the songs saved in the current Spotify user's 'Your Music' library.
descriptions.GET /me/tracks/contains: Check if one or more tracks is already saved in the current Spotify user's 'Your Music' library.
descriptions.GET /playlists/{playlist_id}: Get a playlist owned by a Spotify user.
descriptions.GET /playlists/{playlist_id}/followers/c: Check to see if one or more Spotify users are following a specified playlist.
descriptions.GET /playlists/{playlist_id}/images: Get the current image associated with a specific playlist.
descriptions.GET /playlists/{playlist_id}/tracks: Get full details of the items of a playlist owned by a Spotify user.
descriptions.GET /recommendations: Recommendations are generated based on the available information for a given seed entity and matched against similar artists and tracks.
descriptions.GET /recommendations/available-genre-see: Retrieve a list of available genres seed parameter values for [recommendations](/documentation/web-api/reference/get-recommendations).
descriptions.GET /search:
Get Spotify catalog information about albums, artists, playlists, tracks, shows, episodes or audiobooks that match a keyword string.
**Note: Audiobooks are only available for the US, UK, Ireland...
descriptions.GET /shows: Get Spotify catalog information for several shows based on their Spotify IDs.
descriptions.GET /shows/{id}:
Get Spotify catalog information for a single show identified by its
unique Spotify ID.
descriptions.GET /shows/{id}/episodes: Get Spotify catalog information about an show’s episodes.
descriptions.GET /tracks: Get Spotify catalog information for multiple tracks based on their Spotify IDs.
descriptions.GET /tracks/{id}:
Get Spotify catalog information for a single track identified by its
unique Spotify ID.
descriptions.GET /users/{user_id}: Get public profile information about a Spotify user.
descriptions.GET /users/{user_id}/playlists: Get a list of the playlists owned or followed by a Spotify user.
descriptions.POST /me/player/next: Skips to next track in the user’s queue.
descriptions.POST /me/player/previous: Skips to previous track in the user’s queue.
descriptions.POST /me/player/queue: Add an item to the end of the user's current playback queue.
descriptions.POST /playlists/{playlist_id}/tracks: Add one or more items to a user's playlist.
descriptions.POST /users/{user_id}/playlists: Create a playlist for a Spotify user.
descriptions.PUT /me/albums: Save one or more albums to the current user's 'Your Music' library.
descriptions.PUT /me/audiobooks: Save one or more audiobooks to the current Spotify user's library.
descriptions.PUT /me/episodes:
Save one or more episodes to the current user's library.
This API endpoint is in __beta__ and could change without warning.
descriptions.PUT /me/following: Add the current user as a follower of one or more artists or other Spotify users.
descriptions.PUT /me/player: Transfer playback to a new device and determine if it should start playing.
descriptions.PUT /me/player/pause: Pause playback on the user's account.
descriptions.PUT /me/player/play: Start a new context or resume current playback on the user's active device.
descriptions.PUT /me/player/repeat: Set the repeat mode for the user's playback.
descriptions.PUT /me/player/seek: Seeks to the given position in the user’s currently playing track.
descriptions.PUT /me/player/shuffle: Toggle shuffle on or off for user’s playback.
descriptions.PUT /me/player/volume: Set the volume for the user’s current playback device.
descriptions.PUT /me/shows: Save one or more shows to current Spotify user's library.
descriptions.PUT /me/tracks: Save one or more tracks to the current user's 'Your Music' library.
descriptions.PUT /playlists/{playlist_id}: Change a playlist's name and public/private state.
descriptions.PUT /playlists/{playlist_id}/followers: Add the current user as a follower of a playlist.
descriptions.PUT /playlists/{playlist_id}/images: Replace the image used to represent a specific playlist.
descriptions.PUT /playlists/{playlist_id}/tracks: Either reorder or replace items in a playlist depending on the request's parameters.

notes.DELETE /me/albums: Bulk remove from library, not deleting a resource
notes.DELETE /playlists/{playlist_id}/tracks: Remove items from playlist (action on collection)
notes.GET /me: Audit: label=fetch confirmed. Singleton — summary says 'Get Current User's Profile'. Returns the single authenticated user's profile object.
notes.GET /me/player: Audit: label=fetch confirmed. Singleton — summary says 'Get Playback State'. Returns current playback state object, not a collection.
notes.GET /me/player/currently-playing: Audit: label=fetch confirmed. Singleton — summary says 'Get Currently Playing Track'. Returns a single track object.
notes.GET /me/player/queue: Audit: label=fetch confirmed (debatable). Summary says 'Get the User's Queue'. Returns a single queue object containing items, but the queue itself is a singleton resource, not a collection. Classified as fetch because the API returns one queue, not a list of queues.
notes.GET /recommendations: Revised: generic→list. Returns a list of track recommendations
notes.POST /me/player/queue: Audit: label=generic confirmed. 'Add to queue' is an action — it enqueues a track, not a standard resource creation. No corresponding GET/DELETE for queue items.
notes.POST /playlists/{playlist_id}/tracks: Revised: generic→create. Adding tracks creates sub-resources in the playlist
notes.PUT /me/albums: Bulk save to library, not standard update
